steps.title: Use the reshaping clue
steps.content: The sentence says the gulf's tides shift sediments along the coast and reshape the deltaic lobes over time. The blank must describe the tides affecting the delta's shape and size.

steps.title: Reject wrong effects
steps.content: A means exceeded, B means improved, and D means shielded from harm. None matches tides changing the delta's form. The word meaning affected by an outside force fits the reshaping described. The answer is C.
